summary.en: Kiribati does not have a dedicated national standards body equivalent to Standards Australia or BSI. In practice, AS/NZS CISPR-based standards (referenced by Pacific neighbours such as Fiji and Australia) are treated as the applicable reference framework for EMC emissions. Test reports prepared against AS/NZS or equivalent CISPR-aligned standards are accepted as supporting documentation for MICT type approval. Chinese GB CISPR-derived standards (e.g. GB 9254) are not directly recognised.
summary.zh: 基里巴斯没有相当于澳大利亚标准局或BSI的专门国家标准机构。实际操作中，以AS/NZS CISPR标准（由太平洋邻国斐济和澳大利亚等参照）作为EMC发射的适用参考框架。依据AS/NZS或等效CISPR对齐标准出具的测试报告可作为MICT型号认证的支持文件。中国基于CISPR派生的GB标准（如GB 9254）不被直接认可。
summary.zht: 吉里巴斯沒有相當於澳大利亞標準局或BSI的專門國家標準機構。實際操作中，以AS/NZS CISPR標準（由太平洋鄰國斐濟和澳大利亞等參照）作為EMC發射的適用參考框架。依據AS/NZS或等效CISPR對齊標準出具的測試報告可作為MICT型號認證的支持文件。中國基於CISPR派生的GB標準（如GB 9254）不被直接認可。

standards_or_laws: MICT type approval supporting documentation requirements

summary.en: Chinese products must comply with GB 9254 (IT equipment emissions) and related GB CISPR-derived standards. SRRC type approval covers radio emissions. CCC certification may include EMC testing for certain product categories.
summary.zh: 中国产品须符合GB 9254（信息技术设备发射）及相关GB CISPR派生标准。SRRC型号核准涵盖无线电发射。部分产品类别的CCC认证可包含EMC测试。
summary.zht: 中國產品須符合GB 9254（信息技術設備發射）及相關GB CISPR派生標準。SRRC型號核准涵蓋無線電發射。部分產品類別的CCC認證可包含EMC測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 (Information technology equipment — radio disturbance characteristics)
CCC EMC testing (3C认证电磁兼容测试)

gap.en: Chinese GB 9254 and related CISPR-derived GB standards are not directly recognised in Kiribati. AS/NZS CISPR-aligned test reports are the preferred supporting documentation. IEC/CISPR international test reports may also be accepted. Exporters should obtain test reports from an accredited laboratory referencing AS/NZS CISPR standards and submit these alongside MICT type approval applications.
gap.zh: 中国GB 9254及相关CISPR派生GB标准在基里巴斯不被直接认可。AS/NZS CISPR对齐测试报告是首选支持文件，亦可接受IEC/CISPR国际测试报告。出口商应从认可实验室取得参照AS/NZS CISPR标准的测试报告，并随MICT型号认证申请一并提交。
gap.zht: 中國GB 9254及相關CISPR派生GB標準在吉里巴斯不被直接認可。AS/NZS CISPR對齊測試報告是首選支持文件，亦可接受IEC/CISPR國際測試報告。出口商應從認可實驗室取得參照AS/NZS CISPR標準的測試報告，並隨MICT型號認證申請一併提交。

source.publisher: Ministry of Information, Communication and Transport, Kiribati

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB EMC standards are not recognised in Kiribati. AS/NZS CISPR-aligned or IEC CISPR test reports from an accredited laboratory should be obtained as supporting documentation for MICT type approval. Verify accepted test report formats directly with MICT.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB EMC标准在基里巴斯不被认可。应从认可实验室取得AS/NZS CISPR对齐或IEC CISPR测试报告，作为MICT型号认证的支持文件。请直接向MICT核实可接受的测试报告格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB EMC標準在吉里巴斯不被認可。應從認可實驗室取得AS/NZS CISPR對齊或IEC CISPR測試報告，作為MICT型號認證的支持文件。請直接向MICT核實可接受的測試報告格式。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Immunity and Radio Spectrum Interference
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——抗扰度及无线电频谱干扰
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——抗擾度及無線電頻譜干擾

summary.en: Kiribati radio spectrum management falls under MICT. Devices must not cause harmful interference to licensed radio services across Kiribati's dispersed 33-atoll geography. AS/NZS CISPR 35 (immunity for multimedia equipment) and relevant IEC 61000-4 series standards are the applicable immunity reference framework in the Pacific AS/NZS context. Spectrum coordination may involve ITU-R procedures given Kiribati's ITU membership.
summary.zh: 基里巴斯无线电频谱管理由MICT负责。设备不得对基里巴斯分散的33个环礁范围内的持牌无线电业务造成有害干扰。AS/NZS CISPR 35（多媒体设备抗扰度）及相关IEC 61000-4系列标准是太平洋AS/NZS环境下适用的抗扰度参考框架。鉴于基里巴斯的ITU成员资格，频谱协调可能涉及ITU-R程序。
summary.zht: 吉里巴斯無線電頻譜管理由MICT負責。設備不得對吉里巴斯分散的33個環礁範圍內的持牌無線電業務造成有害干擾。AS/NZS CISPR 35（多媒體設備抗擾度）及相關IEC 61000-4系列標準是太平洋AS/NZS環境下適用的抗擾度參考框架。鑑於吉里巴斯的ITU成員資格，頻譜協調可能涉及ITU-R程序。

standards_or_laws: ITU Radio Regulations (applicable via Kiribati ITU membership)

summary.en: Chinese products must comply with GB/T 17618 (IT equipment immunity) and related GB IEC 61000-4-derived standards. Radio spectrum use is regulated under SRRC type approval and MIIT frequency allocation rules.
summary.zh: 中国产品须符合GB/T 17618（信息技术设备抗扰度）及相关基于IEC 61000-4派生的GB标准。无线电频谱使用受SRRC型号核准及工信部频率分配规则约束。
summary.zht: 中國產品須符合GB/T 17618（信息技術設備抗擾度）及相關基於IEC 61000-4派生的GB標準。無線電頻譜使用受SRRC型號核准及工信部頻率分配規則約束。

standards_or_laws: SRRC frequency and power limit requirements
MIIT frequency allocation table (中华人民共和国无线电频率划分规定)

gap.en: Chinese GB immunity standards and SRRC spectrum approvals are not directly recognised in Kiribati. Exporters should document immunity compliance via AS/NZS CISPR 35 or IEC 61000-4 series test reports. Frequency bands approved in China may differ from those licensed by MICT in Kiribati; frequency and power level compliance must be verified against MICT's local spectrum assignments before deployment.
gap.zh: 中国GB抗扰度标准及SRRC频谱核准在基里巴斯不被直接认可。出口商应通过AS/NZS CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4系列测试报告记录抗扰度合规情况。中国批准的频段可能与MICT在基里巴斯许可的频段不同，部署前须对照MICT本地频谱分配核实频率和功率电平合规性。
gap.zht: 中國GB抗擾度標準及SRRC頻譜核准在吉里巴斯不被直接認可。出口商應通過AS/NZS CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4系列測試報告記錄抗擾度合規情況。中國批准的頻段可能與MICT在吉里巴斯許可的頻段不同，部署前須對照MICT本地頻譜分配核實頻率和功率電平合規性。

source.publisher: Ministry of Information, Communication and Transport, Kiribati

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB immunity standards and SRRC spectrum approvals are not recognised in Kiribati. AS/NZS CISPR 35 or IEC 61000-4 immunity test reports are recommended. Frequency band and power level compliance must be verified against MICT local spectrum assignments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB抗扰度标准及SRRC频谱核准在基里巴斯不被认可。建议提供AS/NZS CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4抗扰度测试报告。须对照MICT本地频谱分配核实频率和功率电平合规性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB抗擾度標準及SRRC頻譜核准在吉里巴斯不被認可。建議提供AS/NZS CISPR 35或IEC 61000-4抗擾度測試報告。須對照MICT本地頻譜分配核實頻率和功率電平合規性。
